description: Tabular AutoML for classification and regression built around honest model selection — the reported score matches production.
rules: Primary API is the sklearn-compatible AutoML facade: AutoML(task=...).fit(X, y) then predict/predict_proba/score; it works inside a sklearn Pipeline.

Optional capabilities are extras: honestml[boosting] (catboost/lightgbm/xgboost), [shap], [optuna], [mlflow], [onnx], [report]. `import honestml` stays lightweight and a missing extra fails fast with the exact `pip install honestml[...]` hint.
Honest selection is the default: out-of-fold scoring with a seeded bootstrap equivalence band, so the simplest model statistically tied with the best wins and ties are disclosed.
